brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Focus on the outcome, not the process. Avoid jargon and superlatives. The first line must earn the second. Use active voice, clear and concise language.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. Searchable also provides real-time alerts, analytics dashboards, and expert support to help brands optimize their AI search presence.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients
Capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search
Jonathan Kvarfordt, VP of GTM Strategy & Marketing

pain_points: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across AI engines
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
Limited visibility into AI search performance metrics
Difficulty competing with other brands for AI search visibility
Limited resources to dedicate to AI search optimization
messaging_angles: Optimize for the future of search
Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Get recommended by AI for local searches
product_knowledge.target_customer: E-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, and agencies

platform_rules_summary: 20-30 hashtags; placement: after 5 line breaks; inline hashtags: False
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Similar data-analytics products on Instagram have seen success with carousels, achieving an average engagement rate of 2.5% and a click-through rate of 1.2%.
content_brief.reasoning: With 5 pain points and 3 proof points, a carousel can effectively showcase the problems and solutions offered by Searchable. The minimal brand tone suggests a straightforward, educational approach. The presence of a strong stat and a customer name can be used to build credibility and trust. Given the 6 features of Searchable, a carousel with 8 slides can provide a comprehensive overview of the product's benefits and value proposition, addressing the pain points and showcasing the features and proof points.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines daily
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable drives growth through AI search visibility and analytics
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO platforms that focus on human search engines
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by highlighting the daily struggle of tracking AI search performance

instagram_content.body: Every hour you spend tracking AI search performance is an hour your competitor gets ahead. Daily, you're checking multiple AI engines, trying to stay on top of your brand mentions and rankings. Searchable drives growth through AI search visibility and analytics, giving you the power to take control of your brand's online presence. Our users have seen 206% share of voice improvements. It's time to stop wasting time and start driving real growth. Start your trial today and discover a better way to manage your AI search performance.
instagram_content.full_caption:
You're invisible in AI search.
Every hour you spend tracking AI search performance is an hour your competitor gets ahead. Daily, you're checking multiple AI engines, trying to stay on top of your brand mentions and rankings. Searchable drives growth through AI search visibility and analytics, giving you the power to take control of your brand's online presence. Our users have seen 206% share of voice improvements. It's time to stop wasting time and start driving real growth. Start your trial today and discover a better way to manage your AI search performance.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, and the mechanism of how Searchable drives growth is self-explanatory, but the transition between sentences could be smoother. The hook is attention-grabbing and creates a sense of urgency, and the payoff is clear, but it could be stronger with a more specific daily friction. The tone mostly follows the writing instruction, using active voice and clear language, but there are a few instances of slightly promotional language, such as 'driving real growth' and 'unlock growth'. The copy accurately represents the primary claim and includes the proof point of 206% share of voice improvements, which is directly traceable to the primary claim.
